by_product.term: Electronic cigarette, electronic nicotine or vaping product (E-cigarette, e-cigars, e-hookahs, e-pipes, vape pens, hookah pens, and personal vaporizers; E-liquids, e-juice or vape juice)
Electronic cigarette or vaping product (also known as E-cigarette, vape pen, hookah pen, mod, e-cigar, e-hookah, and e-pipe; E-liquid (also known as "e-juice" or "vape juice"))
Cigarette

Electronic cigarette or vaping product (for example, E-cigarette, vape or vape pen, personal vaporizer, cigalike, e-pen, hookah pen, mod, e-cigar, e-hookah, and e-pipe; E-liquid (also known as "e-juice" or "vape juice"))
Other

Electronic cigarette or vaping product (for example, E-cigarette, vape or vape pen, ENDS, personal vaporizer, cigalike, e-pen, hookah pen, mod, e-cigar, e-hookah, and e-pipe; E-liquid (also known as "e-juice" or "vape juice"))
Roll-your-own cigarette
Snuff (dry or moist for use in nose or mouth)
Oral nicotine product (typically marketed as tobacco-free and nicotine-containing; for example, nicotine pouches, lozenges, gum, or gummies used for recreation)
Chewing tobacco (loose leaf chew, plug, twist/roll)
Pipe or pipe tobacco
Small Cigar, Little Cigar or Cigarillo
Snus (pouches or loose)
Cigar (for example, premium or large cigars)
Tobacco Heating System (heats tobacco leaf not liquid)
Cigar (large or premium)
Dissolvable (for example, strips, sticks, orbs)
Heated Tobacco Product (also known as "Heat not Burn"; heats dry or moist tobacco)
Heated Tobacco Product (also known as “Heat not Burn”; heats dry or moist tobacco)
Mixture of tobacco with spices, herbs, nuts, fruit, plant leaves, etc. (used for chewing)
